generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [ base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder mounted on the crane arm that reports the current arm angle." DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData ]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [ base:desc "Anemometer measuring the wind speed around the structure." DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData ]

instance XAxisStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [ base:desc "Stepper motor actuating the linear rail (X axis)." ]

instance YAxisStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [ base:desc "Stepper motor actuating the rotational axis of the crane arm (Y axis)." ]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [ base:desc "Electromagnet that holds and releases the load during lifting operations." ]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [ DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder ]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [ DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer ]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [ base:desc "Time‑series data of the crane arm swing angle recorded at high frequency." DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, ControlPythonScript, ValidationPythonScript DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData ]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [ base:desc "Time‑series data of the wind speed measured by the anemometer." DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GrafanaDashboard DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData ]

instance CADGeometricalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [ base:desc "CAD geometrical model created in Autodesk Fusion 360, capturing the physical structure of the gantry crane." DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationPythonScript ]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [ base:desc "Detailed kinematic model describing the linear and rotational axes used by the optimal control service." DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPythonScript ]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [ base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database used for high‑frequency sensor logging." DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService ]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [ base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating publish/subscribe messaging between the physical crane interface and Digital Twin." DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService ]

instance ControlPythonScript : DTDFVocab:Enabler [ base:desc "Python script performing real‑time optimal control and trajectory planning." DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService ]

instance ValidationPythonScript : DTDFVocab:Enabler [ base:desc "Python script executing continuous validation comparing live sensor data against the CAD‑based kinematic model." DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService ]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [ base:desc "Grafana dashboard providing interactive visualization of sensor data and simulation results." DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService ]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [ base:desc "Service that logs sensor data received from the MQTT broker to TimescaleDB." DTDFVocab:provides LoggingInsight ]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [ base:desc "Real‑time optimal control and trajectory planning service interfacing with the physical controller." DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandInsight ]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [ base:desc "Service that continuously validates live sensor data against the CAD‑based kinematic model." DTDFVocab:provides ConfidenceBoundsInsight ]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [ base:desc "Interactive data visualisation dashboard for monitoring system performance." DTDFVocab:provides DashboardInsight ]

instance CorrectiveActionService : DTDFVocab:Service [ base:desc "Service allowing operators to trigger corrective actions directly from the dashboard." DTDFVocab:provides CorrectiveAction ]

instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [ base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualizing sensor data and simulation results." ]

instance ConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [ base:desc "Confidence bounds derived from simulation comparisons, indicating reliability of insights." ]

instance ControlCommandInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [ base:desc "Insight providing optimal trajectory recommendations to the controller." ]

instance LoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [ base:desc "Insight confirming successful logging of sensor data into TimescaleDB." ]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [ base:desc "Operator‑triggered action to adjust crane motion or stop operation based on dashboard alerts." DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false ]

instance ArduinoNanoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [ base:desc "Arduino Nano microcontroller used to interface stepper motors and sensors via serial/USB." ]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [ base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, XAxisStepperMotor, YAxisStepperMotor, ElectromagnetActuator, MosquittoMQTTBroker, TimescaleDB, GrafanaDashboard, ControlPythonScript, ValidationPythonScript, ArduinoNanoController ]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued by the Control Application, which consumes trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service.  These high‑level commands are passed to the Physical Crane Interface through a Python method call interface.  The Physical Crane Interface then translates the high‑level target positions and motion profiles into low‑level motor commands that are sent to the crane controllers.  Feedback from the physical machine (e.g., current position, velocity or error status) is routed back through the same interface to the Control Application for realtime monitoring, but the document does not describe additional authentication or acknowledgment protocols."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs containerized components such as an InfluxDB time‑series database and an ActiveMQ message broker, each deployed on pre‑configured virtual machine images that also host the physical environment (greenhouse or Raspberry‑Pi). The architecture is ad‑hoc, with no dedicated orchestration layer or central registry; each digital twin instance maintains its own state locally. For the Air Quality Management exemplar, Microsoft Azure services are used for data processing and visualization, while the GreenhouseDT exemplar remains on‑premises. Communication between physical sensors and digital twin services is performed over ActiveMQ topics, with data persisted in InfluxDB."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service continuously compares the measurements obtained during crane motion against the trajectories simulated by the digital twin. For each executed trajectory the service computes a distance metric between the measured and simulated positions and flags a mismatch when the metric exceeds a predefined threshold, thereby enabling automated detection of model‑discrepancy and ensuring that the digital twin remains a valid representation of the physical system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin relies on an MQTT broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) that mediates publish/subscribe messaging among the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, and Continuous Validation services.  Data persistence is handled by a TimescaleDB instance accessed by all services.  The document does not detail the underlying network topology, bandwidth, or reliability mechanisms beyond the use of these software components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin containers—including the MQTT broker, TimescaleDB, Grafana dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, and control interfaces—are provisioned as logical containers on a single physical host or node.  The document does not specify a cloud, edge, or on‑premises distinction, nor does it provide hardware or scalability parameters, beyond the abstract notion that the system can be deployed in a containerized environment."
]
